title: Dadget's Animal Villagers + Fresh Animations
description: Cute animal villagers now freshly animated with this fresh animations compatibility pack!
body:
## Dadget's Animal Villagers + Fresh Animations

Compatibility pack to give the cute animal vilalgers the animation style of Fresh Animations.

NOTE: Because each animal's face is different their faces are not animated.

Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home), along with the [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) Resource Pack.

## IMPORTANT

For the animations to work correctly you need to have Dadgets Animal Villagers + Fresh Animations above Dadget's Animal Villagers which is above Fresh Animations.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65572214a30dea676b277824f51f97de08415733_0.webp)
